## Meeting Purpose

[Farewell stand-up for Darrell Etherington, discussing his new job and maintaining connections with the team.](https://fathom.video/share/xnSDbe1HxnDAqdyC3VyV97iK6kmjzzCd?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Darrell's starting a new role at a tech-focused PR firm (55 people, remote) on Tuesday, working with marquee tech clients](https://fathom.video/share/xnSDbe1HxnDAqdyC3VyV97iK6kmjzzCd?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)
  - [He'll continue side projects (podcast, newsletter) alongside the new job](https://fathom.video/share/xnSDbe1HxnDAqdyC3VyV97iK6kmjzzCd?tab=summary&timestamp=270.0)
  - [The team expressed appreciation for Darrell's contributions and discussed staying in touch](https://fathom.video/share/xnSDbe1HxnDAqdyC3VyV97iK6kmjzzCd?tab=summary&timestamp=554.0)

## Topics

### Darrell's New Job

  - [Starting Tuesday at a traditional comms/PR agency (holiday Monday in North America)](https://fathom.video/share/xnSDbe1HxnDAqdyC3VyV97iK6kmjzzCd?tab=summary&timestamp=95.0)
  - [Agency founded by a long-time colleague \~8-9 years ago](https://fathom.video/share/xnSDbe1HxnDAqdyC3VyV97iK6kmjzzCd?tab=summary&timestamp=22.0)
  - [55 employees, mostly tech clients including startups](https://fathom.video/share/xnSDbe1HxnDAqdyC3VyV97iK6kmjzzCd?tab=summary&timestamp=35.0)
  - [Fully remote with offices in San Francisco and New York](https://fathom.video/share/xnSDbe1HxnDAqdyC3VyV97iK6kmjzzCd?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)
  - [Initial clients: Cursor (coding assistant), potential biotech accounts](https://fathom.video/share/xnSDbe1HxnDAqdyC3VyV97iK6kmjzzCd?tab=summary&timestamp=76.0)
  - [Agency emphasizes careful client selection and swift offboarding if necessary](https://fathom.video/share/xnSDbe1HxnDAqdyC3VyV97iK6kmjzzCd?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)
  - [Allows continuation of side projects (podcast, newsletter)](https://fathom.video/share/xnSDbe1HxnDAqdyC3VyV97iK6kmjzzCd?tab=summary&timestamp=272.0)

### Darrell's Podcasts and Content

  - [Recently started AI-focused podcast (2 months ago) with ex-TechCrunch colleague](https://fathom.video/share/xnSDbe1HxnDAqdyC3VyV97iK6kmjzzCd?tab=summary&timestamp=285.0)
  - [Co-host now at Centauri (AI-powered bug reporting tool, GrowthX client)](https://fathom.video/share/xnSDbe1HxnDAqdyC3VyV97iK6kmjzzCd?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Long-running podcast (5-6 years) reviewing streaming shows/movies](https://fathom.video/share/xnSDbe1HxnDAqdyC3VyV97iK6kmjzzCd?tab=summary&timestamp=378.0)
  - [Artifactor website created for AI podcast (vibe-coded by Darrell)](https://fathom.video/share/xnSDbe1HxnDAqdyC3VyV97iK6kmjzzCd?tab=summary&timestamp=469.0)
  - [Team members have listened to/watched Darrell's content](https://fathom.video/share/xnSDbe1HxnDAqdyC3VyV97iK6kmjzzCd?tab=summary&timestamp=431.0)

### Team Interactions and Farewells

  - [Team expressed appreciation for Darrell's coolness and helpfulness](https://fathom.video/share/xnSDbe1HxnDAqdyC3VyV97iK6kmjzzCd?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)
  - [Discussed potential future collaborations or agency acquisitions](https://fathom.video/share/xnSDbe1HxnDAqdyC3VyV97iK6kmjzzCd?tab=summary&timestamp=567.0)
  - [Darrell offered to provide references if needed](https://fathom.video/share/xnSDbe1HxnDAqdyC3VyV97iK6kmjzzCd?tab=summary&timestamp=581.0)
  - [Attempted synchronized "Bye Darrell" (humorously out of sync due to lag)](https://fathom.video/share/xnSDbe1HxnDAqdyC3VyV97iK6kmjzzCd?tab=summary&timestamp=618.0)
